content_type: informational B-roll montage with text cards
summary: A branded 'Beyond the Border: CBP Secures Super Bowl LX' segment recapping CBP's Super Bowl security operations through animated category cards (Perimeter Security, Import Screening, Merchandise Inspections) over B-roll of a helicopter cockpit, patrol boats, cargo screening, and a table of NFL trophies and counterfeit merchandise. It is an informational operations montage with graphic labels and no music, narration, or audio track. Despite the polished graphics it is silent slogan-over-B-roll rather than a music-driven or pop-culture genre spectacle, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: BEYOND the BORDER; CBP SECURES SUPER BOWL LX; PERIMETER SECURITY; IMPORT SCREENING; MERCHANDISE INSPECTIONS; U.S. Customs and Border Protection; NFL
